name: Content Warnings
description: Automatically tags movies and TV shows with content warnings (Violence, Language, Nudity, etc.) using Groq AI. Tags are stored with a CW: prefix so they never clash with existing tags.
overview: Uses Groq AI to identify and tag content descriptors for your entire Jellyfin library.

versions.changelog: Fixed library status table not loading — switched to native fetch for proper JSON parsing.
Episode-level tagging option (off by default, yellow warning shown). Library status table grouped by series with episodes indented. Per-row rescan for movies, series and episodes.
Fixed assembly version display. Library status table with live per-row updates, per-item rescan, smart cache, improved filters.
Library status table with live per-row updates, per-item rescan, smart cache, improved filters. Fixed catalog install.
Danger zone with full rescan option, API rate limit warning, separate clear-only button.
Improved Groq prompt accuracy, scan button on settings page, re-process single item, clear all CW: tags.
Initial release. Automatic content warning tagging using Groq AI. Supports movies and TV shows. Includes scheduled task for bulk processing.
